name: veroptima-qa-code-vue
description: Standalone public-MIT Vue (vue-compiler) code-enumerator backend — a parser-driven (@vue/compiler-sfc + @babel/parser + pug-lexer/pug-parser) RAW branch enumerator for .vue SFCs (HTML + Pug templates, element-plus + vee-validate). Emits RawBranch (NO id) against the PUBLIC @qa-expert/code-enumerator-spi ONLY — zero core model IP.
